drop_hint:
Drop a folder here
(replaces / adds to pipeline)
multi_source_hint: Multiple sources: separate with ';' or a new line
legend_agents: P = processed   E = errors   Q = queue
status_target_updated: TARGET_DIR updated and saved to setting.py
status_stopping_cleanup: Stopping pipeline and cleaning temporary folders...
status_stopped_cleanup_done: Pipeline was stopped by the user. Cleanup finished
status_shutdown_started: Pipeline finished. Computer will shut down in 300 seconds...
status_shutdown_failed: Could not shut down the computer: {error}
dialog_source_not_found: No SOURCE_DIRS were found. Check the selected folders.
dialog_drop_folder_only: Please drop a folder for SOURCE_DIRS.
settings_lm_a7: A7 — Rename  ·  empty = same as A6
keep_sources_hint: Do not delete source files after packing — safe default mode
settings_seed_hashes_hint: Scan TARGET before starting and load hashes — already packed books are skipped automatically
settings_isbn_lookup_hint: Fetch title and author by ISBN via OpenLibrary or Google Books
deep_analysis_hint: More text and longer timeout — better for rare or poorly tagged files
settings_lm_fast_precheck_hint: Quick request before the full one — accepted only when the model is confident
settings_lm_force_full_hint: Request genre + author + title for every book, even when tags are already sufficient
settings_lm_fill_author_hint: Extra LM request to recover the author when the tag is empty or 'Unknown'
settings_lm_without_snippet_hint: Send request even without a text snippet — model relies on filename and archive path
settings_lm_strict_json_hint: Ask the model to return strict JSON — faster to process, not all models support it
rename_output_hint: LM translates title and author to the output folder language
settings_restart_hint: Runs use GUI values immediately. Window size and fonts apply after restart.
tip_drop_zone:
Drop a folder with books here.
While running — adds to the pipeline without stopping.
tip_source_entry: One or more source directories. Separate with ';' or a new line. All subfolders are scanned recursively.
tip_target_entry: Destination folder: sorted ZIP archives will be placed here, organized by genre and author.
tip_start_btn: Start the pipeline: A1→A2→...→A8. Sources are scanned recursively.
tip_stop_btn: Stop the pipeline. Current tasks finish cleanly, temporary files are removed.
tip_progress: Progress by data volume: processed GB / total discovered GB
tip_time_label: Data volume: processed / total. Processing speed. Estimated time remaining.
tip_keep_sources: Do not delete source files after packing into ZIP — recommended for the first run.
tip_deep_analysis: Iterative reading: book text is fed to the LM model in chunks (up to 8×4000 chars) — the model refines genre after each chunk and stops when confidence is high enough. Better for rare or poorly tagged books.
tip_rename_output: LM translates title and author to the output language (requires a Rename provider).
tip_shutdown: Shut down the computer 5 minutes after the pipeline finishes successfully.
tip_stat_seen: Total files discovered by agent A1 (including files inside archives)
tip_stat_done: Files fully processed (reached end of pipeline with any result)
tip_stat_packed: ZIP archives successfully created and moved to TARGET_DIR
tip_stat_dupes: Duplicates skipped: already in the library by XXH64 hash
tip_stat_nobook: Files not recognized as books, moved to the NoBook folder
tip_stat_failed: Files that ended with an error (moved to the Error folder)
tip_agent_A1: A1 Search: recursive walk of SOURCE_DIRS, creating a task for each file.
tip_agent_A2: A2 Unpack: extracts archives (ZIP, RAR, 7z, FB2.ZIP and nested).
tip_agent_A3: A3 Book?: decides if a file is a book by extension, magic bytes and size.
tip_agent_A4: A4 XXH64: computes a fast hash and discards files already in the library.
tip_agent_A5: A5 Tags: reads metadata from built-in tags (EPUB, FB2, DJVU, PDF…).
tip_agent_A5b: A5b ISBN: fetches title and author by ISBN via OpenLibrary or Google Books.
tip_agent_A6: A6 Genre: asks the LM model for genre, author, title (LM Studio / Ollama).
tip_agent_A7: A7 Rename: builds destination path Genre/Author/Title.ext, normalizes the name.
tip_agent_A8: A8 Pack: creates ZIP via 7-Zip (mx=3), tests the archive, moves to TARGET.
tip_events: Latest pipeline events. Errors shown in red.
tip_status_bar: Current pipeline status and the active A6 file
tip_log: Path to the current session log file. Click to open in Explorer.
